sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28014" key="docokaqairetiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοξο-καθαιρετικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n28014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clever at removing suspicion,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
